✓ Professional licensed tour guides
✓ Real-time booking system

• Additional revenue stream with zero investment

• Positive guest reviews and referrals

REVENUE EXAMPLE:
If just 10 of your guests book tours monthly:
• Average tour booking: Rp 1.500.000
• Your commission (15%): Rp 225.000/booking
• Monthly potential: Rp 2.250.000

We would love to schedule a brief call to discuss this opportunity further.

Best regards,
i Made Purna Ananda
CEO, Bali Travel Platform
